source: CaseBrain H5 presentation builders (no Brain 1 mutation)

matterConfidence.label: Needs review before relying
matterConfidence.doNotRelyYetReason: Human review or material gaps flagged on current papers.

evidenceStates.label: Outstanding source material on disclosure schedule
evidenceStates.evidenceAnchor: - Full mailbox export / email source material — outstanding

fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.label: Outstanding source material on disclosure schedule
fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: Additional source-material appears outstanding on the current file — solicitor to confirm relevance before fixing hearing position. — still chase if disclosure-relevant.

fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.label: *Statement of offence:** Fraud by false representation
fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: Served on bundle — brief plan ledger.

fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: Outstanding on bundle — brief plan ledger.

fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: Outstanding on bundle — brief plan ledger.

doNotOverstate: Do not import BWV unless the papers support it.
Do not import custody safeguards unless the papers support it.
Do not import drugs continuity unless the papers support it.
Do not import ABE unless the papers support it.
Do not import phone extraction/metadata unless the papers support it.
Do not state "CAD/999 timing supports" — CAD/999 material is not safely on file as served
hardRules: Referred only does not mean usable.
Inference must be labelled as inference.
No line is sendable just because a source exists.

chaseItems.label: Outstanding source material on disclosure schedule
chaseItems.copySuggestion:
Please provide the outstanding source material identified on the disclosure schedule, including subscriber/account data, message exports, call logs, and any MG11/source material referred to but not served or confirm in writing why it is not available.

[CaseBrain — CPS chase copy

courtNote.text:
The defence asks the court to record outstanding bank/device source and loss material.

[CaseBrain — court line copy. Evidence state: needs review. Confirm before addressing the court.]

exportVersion.reviewFooter: Solicitor review required before sending to CPS, court, or client.
